title: Local Codex Two Sum Dev Loop

dimensions.label: Target Preparation
dimensions.description: Prepare one Codex target cleanly, including any trust/interstitial prompt handling.

dimensions.label: Target Reuse
dimensions.description: Keep using the same Codex target across turns instead of creating a fresh one.

dimensions.label: Workspace Correctness
dimensions.description: Stay inside the requested workspace and keep path identity clear.

dimensions.label: Execution Loop
dimensions.description: Actually create files, run tests, and complete the requested local coding loop.

dimensions.label: Follow-up Repair
dimensions.description: Handle the break-and-fix follow-up in the same target with clear continuity.
